mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, am.name as access_level, u.preferred_silent_mode, u.created_at FROM bot_user u JOIN access_mode am ON u.access_level = am.access_level WHERE u.id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bot_user (id, username, access_level, preferred_silent_mode) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{accessLevel.level}, false)
